name: Portobella Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 3 cups chicken stock or canned low-salt broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a heavy large Dutch oven over medium heat.
2. Add the chopped onion and leeks (white and pale green parts only), and sauté until tender, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the chopped Portobella mushrooms and sauté for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Reduce the heat to low. Stir in the flour and cook until the mixture is thick, stirring occasionally for about 3 minutes.
5. Gradually stir in the chicken stock or low-salt broth and dry sherry. Bring the soup to a boil, stirring occasionally.
6. Reduce the heat and simmer until the soup has thickened, about 10 minutes.
7. Stir in the half and half. Simmer until slightly thickened, about 10 more minutes.
8. Stir in the cayenne pepper. Season with white pepper and salt.
9. (Optional) The soup can be prepared up to 4 hours ahead. Cover and refrigerate. When ready to serve, stir in the remaining 2 tablespoons sherry and bring to a simmer before serving.
